title: Skyopolis
description: A mod mainly designed to be used inside the skyopolis 5 modpack, but does work standalone as well
body:
A mod mainly designed to be used inside the skyopolis 5 modpack, but does work standalone as well
This mod adds structures to the overworld so unless you use a void overworld things may lloo a bit wierd works great with skyblock builder

contains various items such as;

aqua catalyst (can be used to make water from a mulch block)

Mulch (craftable from leaves and saplings, used to make dirt)

Mushroom Ball (acts likes slimeballs, used to create mycelium from dirt on a right click)
Organic Seeds (used to make dirt from mulch)

Various different dust types including grout, sand and gravel

Adds lapis nuggets

Loot boxes (WIP)

Adds wooden shears

And much much more

 

Join the discord to report bugs issues suggestions

https://discord.gg/f92STFGN32
